mapper.select: SELECT id, group_id AS groupId, token, inviter_user_id AS inviterUserId, max_uses AS maxUses, current_uses AS currentUses, expire_at AS expireAt, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_group_invite WHERE token = #{token} AND status = 1 AND (expire_at IS NULL OR expire_at > NOW()) AND (max_uses IS NULL OR current_uses < max_uses) LIMIT 1

SELECT gi.id AS inviteId, gi.token, gi.max_uses AS maxUses, gi.current_uses AS currentUses, gi.expire_at AS expireAt, gi.created_at AS createdAt, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username) AS inviterNickname FROM im_group_invite gi JOIN im_user u ON u.id = gi.inviter_user_id WHERE gi.group_id = #{groupId} AND gi.status = 1 ORDER BY gi.created_at DESC
